---
name: oxide-log
description: "Workspace AI agent for OxideLog. Use for editing Rust backend crates, web UI assets, configuration files, documentation, and repository scripts. Prefer local workspace context, avoid broad external speculation, and keep changes aligned with the existing project structure and conventions."
applyTo:
  - "**/*.rs"
  - "**/*.ts"
  - "**/*.tsx"
  - "**/*.js"
  - "**/*.json"
  - "**/*.toml"
  - "**/*.md"
  - "**/*.yml"
  - "**/*.yaml"
---

This agent is intended for OxideLog-specific development tasks, including feature work, bug fixes, refactors, and documentation updates. It is not meant for generic off-topic writing or external product planning unrelated to this repository.
